info.title: School-ERP APIs
info.description: Comprehensive School Management System API with multi-tenant architecture

tags.name: Class Master
tags.description: Class master data management (Pre-K to 12th grade)

tags.name: Section Master
tags.description: Section master data management (A, B, C, D, etc.)

tags.name: Subject Master
tags.description: Subject master data management (Academic, Co-curricular, etc.)

tags.name: House Master
tags.description: School house master data management (Red, Blue, Green, etc.)

tags.name: Department Master
tags.description: Department master data management (Mathematics, Science, etc.)

tags.name: Leave Type Master
tags.description: Leave type master data management (Medical, Casual, etc.)

tags.name: Leave Policy Master
tags.description: Leave policy master data management (Department-wise leave policies)

tags.name: Fee Category Master
tags.description: Fee category master data management (Tuition, Transport, Library, etc.)

tags.name: Academic Year Classes
tags.description: Academic Year Classes configuration and management

parameters.description: UUID of the SuperAdmin to delete

get.summary: Get all schools with associated plans

post.description: Generates a new access token using a valid refresh token.
Sends a password reset link/token to the user's email.
Allows user to reset password using a valid token.

parameters.name: token
parameters.description: Reset token sent to the user's email

x-notes.passwordPolicy: You cannot reuse your previous passwords (last 5).

400.description: Invalid or expired token

get.description: Fetch all modules available for SuperAdmin
Fetch all modules

400.description: Module already exists

get.description: Fetch a single module with its sub-modules by ID

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the module to fetch

patch.description: Updates the details of an existing module

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the module to update

400.description: Module already exists

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the module to delete

get.description: Fetch all plans with their modules and plan-specific sub-modules. Only returns submodules that were selected for each specific plan. Use ?active=true to get only active plans.

parameters.name: active
parameters.description: Filter by active status. Use 'true' to get only active plans, omit to get all plans

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Creates a new plan with associated modules and sub-modules

planPros.description: Plan advantages (comma-separated). Will be converted to array automatically. Example: 'Unlimited storage, 24/7 support, Custom branding'

planCons.description: Plan disadvantages (comma-separated). Will be converted to array automatically. Example: 'Premium pricing, Annual commitment required'

modules.description: JSON string array of modules with their selected sub-modules. Format: '[{"moduleId":"uuid","subModules":["uuid1","uuid2"]}]'

400.description: Bad Request - Various validation errors

message.example: Plan with this name or code already exists
message.description: Error messages: 'Plan with this name or code already exists' | 'Some provided module IDs are invalid' | 'Some submodule IDs are invalid or don't belong to module {moduleId}' | 'Duplicate submodule IDs found in module {moduleId}' | 'SubModule ID {id} is duplicated across multiple modules'

message.example: Something went wrong while creating plan

get.description: Fetch a single plan with its modules and plan-specific sub-modules by ID. Only returns submodules that were selected for this specific plan.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the plan to fetch

modules.description: Array of modules with their plan-specific submodules only

subModules.description: Only submodules selected for this plan (not all submodules of the module)

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

patch.description: Updates a plan's details and associated modules. If modules field is not provided, existing module mappings remain unchanged. If modules field is provided with empty array, all module mappings will be removed.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the plan to update

subModules.description: Array of selected sub-module IDs (must belong to the specified module, no duplicates allowed)

modules.description: Optional. If not provided, existing module mappings remain unchanged. If provided as empty array [], all modules will be removed. Each submodule must belong to its parent module and cannot be duplicated.

400.description: Bad Request - Various validation errors

message.example: Another plan with same name or code already exists
message.description: Error messages: 'Another plan with same name or code already exists' | 'Some provided module IDs are invalid' | 'Some submodule IDs are invalid or don't belong to module {moduleId}' | 'Duplicate submodule IDs found in module {moduleId}' | 'SubModule ID {id} is duplicated across multiple modules'

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

delete.description: Soft deletes a plan by ID (sets isDeleted to true, plan can be restored)

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the plan to delete

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

404.description: Plan not found or already deleted

delete.description: Permanently deletes a plan from the database along with all associated modules and submodules. This action cannot be undone.

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the plan to permanently delete

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

message.example: Something went wrong while deleting plan

delete.summary: Remove a specific module from a plan
delete.description: Removes a specific module and its associated submodules from a plan. The module itself is not deleted, only its association with the plan is removed.

parameters.name: moduleId
parameters.description: ID of the module to remove from the plan

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

404.description: Plan not found, Module not found, or Module not associated with this plan

message.example: Module not associated with this plan
message.description: Possible messages: 'Plan not found' | 'Module not found' | 'Module not associated with this plan'

message.example: Something went wrong while removing module

post.description: Restores a soft-deleted plan by setting isDeleted to false

parameters.name: id
parameters.description: ID of the plan to restore

401.description: Unauthorized - Invalid or missing JWT token

post.description: Authenticate school admin using email and password

400.description: Email and password are required

404.description: Admin's email or role not found

post.description: Creates a new school along with a school admin and user. Also creates a dedicated database schema for the school.

slug.description: Unique identifier for the school (used for database schema)

plan.description: Plan ID from the plans table

notes.example: Premier educational institution with modern facilities

school.notes: Premier educational institution with modern facilities

value.message: Missing required fields: slug, institutionName, plan

User with this email already exists

id.description: Unique identifier for the class master

class_code.description: Optional code for the class (e.g., C1, C2)

created_by.description: ID of the user who created this record

updated_by.description: ID of the user who last updated this record

id.description: Unique identifier for the section master

section_name.description: Name of the section (e.g., A, B, C, D)

section_code.description: Optional code for the section (e.g., SEC-A, SEC-B)

created_by.description: ID of the user who created this record

updated_by.description: ID of the user who last updated this record

id.description: Unique identifier for the subject master

subject_name.description: Name of the subject (e.g., Mathematics, English)

subject_code.description: Optional code for the subject (e.g., MATH, ENG)

created_by.description: ID of the user who created this record

updated_by.description: ID of the user who last updated this record

id.description: Unique identifier for the house master

house_name.description: Name of the house (e.g., Red House, Blue House)

house_code.description: Optional code for the house (e.g., RED, BLUE)

house_color.description: Hex color code for the house (e.g., #FF0000)

created_by.description: ID of the user who created this record

updated_by.description: ID of the user who last updated this record
